title: Removal and inspection of outside temperature sensor

blocks.text: Removal and inspection of outside temperature sensor
Remove the lock and remove the outside temperature sensor (B) from the bracket (A). Disconnect the coupler (C).
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
Check that the resistance between the No. 1 and No. 2 terminals of the outside temperature sensor is within the range shown in the graph.

items.text: Place the sensor part in water with ice to cool it down and measure the resistance value. Next, measure the change in resistance while pouring hot water.
Place the sensor part in water with ice to cool it down and measure the resistance value. Next, measure the change in resistance while pouring hot water.
Since the inside of the sensor is a thermistor, a digital circuit tester should be used since a large measurement current will cause self-heating.
Since the inside of the sensor is a thermistor, a digital circuit tester should be used since a large measurement current will cause self-heating.
Measure in a location where the ambient temperature is stable.
Measure in a location where the ambient temperature is stable.
